title: NOIR 街头服饰 Campaign
description: Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign poster for NOIR, a modern streetwear brand. Show one hero oversized hoodie as the main focus against a gritty urban backdrop with wet concrete floors, dramatic low lighting
prompt_raw: Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign poster for NOIR, a modern streetwear brand. Show one hero oversized hoodie as the main focus against a gritty urban backdrop with wet concrete floors, dramatic low lighting, subtle smoke in the air and a raw street energy. Add bold minimal typography with the brand name NOIR and a short campaign headline like "Wear the Dark." Make it feel like a real high-end streetwear editorial, sharp detail, realistic fabric textures, modern and edgy, deep black tones with subtle grey accents, no clutter, no collage.
prompt_preview: Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign poster for NOIR, a modern streetwear brand. Show one hero oversized hoodie as the main focus against a gritty urban backdrop with wet concrete floors, dramatic low lighting
prompt_display_cn:
案例「NOIR 街头服饰 Campaign」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：Create a premium, highly realistic 1:1 campaign 海报 for NOIR, a modern streetwear brand. Show one hero oversized hoodie as the main focus against a gritty urban backdrop with wet concrete floors, dramatic low 光线ing, subtle smoke in the air and a raw street energy. Add bold 极简 字体排版 with the brand name NOIR and a short campaign headline like "Wear the Dark." Make it feel like a real high-end streetwear editorial, sharp detail, realistic fabric textures, modern and edgy, deep black tones with subtle grey accents, no clutter, no collage.
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
